recommendations.action: Prioritize TS0601 conflict resolution as it has the widest blast radius.
Always run with --dry-run first. Review all changes before applying.
Consider implementing fingerprint versioning or driver-specific productId ranges to prevent future conflicts.
Add this script to CI pipeline to detect new conflicts before merge.
